title: Outlaws of the Prairie
writer: Ed Earl Repp, Harry F. Olmsted
actors: Charles Starrett, Donald Grayson, Iris Meredith
plot: The Rangers are after a large outlaw gang. Dart arrives early with the rest of the troop following disguised as a medicine show. Dart learns Lupton is behind the gold shipment robberies and gets proof from his safe. Dart then plan...
